description: The single Delivery project for the instance — epics + stories + tasks together. Two VIEWS serve the two audiences (not two projects): a Board view (7-state Kanban · Status × Seat) and an EPICS view (Table · filter label:level:epic · Sub-issues progress). Operator-driven via /check. Provisioned by onboarding/setup-board.sh.

options.name: Backlog
options.description: exists, not yet steered (no committed AC)

options.name: In Progress
options.description: a seat is building it; a branch exists

options.name: Tested
options.description: independent verification PASS against the AC

options.name: Released
options.description: deployed + verified in target env; issue closed

options.name: Blocked
options.description: a consult-exception or owner-touchpoint is pending

options.name: Cancelled
options.description: closed without shipping (NOT_PLANNED: duplicate · won't-do · obsolete)
